A romantic drama about how people only truly die when they are forgotten.

title: Born In Blue
overview: Born In Blue is produced using Unreal Engine and set in Mount Gambier (Berrin), South Australia. The story follows Lumy, a young girl who grows up in New Zealand before moving with her father to the quiet volcanic town beside the Blue Lake. In the late 1800s, time traveling villains arrive from the future, drawn to a powerful phenomenon beneath the lake and seeking Lumy herself. At the lake’s edge, her father sacrifices his life to protect her, altering the course of time. Marked by trauma and a mysterious bond to the water, Lumy grows up driven by grief and unanswered questions, turning to science while unaware she is still being hunted. Years later, alongside fellow scientist Ashton, she uncovers the truth the same force beneath Berrin fuels both the villains’ technology and her own ability to move through time. Realising what she has inherited, Lumy prepares to fight back and protect what her father died to save.

title: It Is Not Her Fault
overview: In 2016, a group of close friends dreams of becoming doctors as they navigate their final year of middle school. Amidst the nostalgia of the era, they experience friendship, young love, and unexpected challenges, leading to a climax that changes their lives forever.

title: Prompt: Make a Documentary
overview: Prompt: Make a Documentary investigates the growing influence of artificial intelligence on the film industry.  The documentary places the rise of AI within the broader historical context of cinema’s evolution, drawing parallels with earlier technological shifts such as the introduction of sound, colour, and digital visual effects. By revisiting landmark moments in film history, the film demonstrates that disruption has always been part of cinema’s DNA, while questioning whether AI represents a fundamentally different kind of change.  Featuring insights from directors, academics, and practitioners, Prompt: Make a Documentary explores the tension between innovation and integrity, the democratisation of creative tools, and the ethical implications of automation in the arts. The film ultimately asks whether artificial intelligence will empower the next generation of storytellers or redefine creativity itself.

title: born blue
overview: PLEASE NOTE: June 2027 is not a confirmed date. It is our target completion date and may change.  Born In Blue is produced using Unreal Engine. Unreal Engine is a trademark or registered trademark of Epic Games, Inc. All rights reserved.  Set in Mount Gambier, South Australia, the film follows Lumy, a young girl who witnesses her father’s sacrifice at the edge of the mysterious Blue Lake. Growing up with unhealed trauma and an unexplainable power tied to the water itself, Lumy retreats into science while being quietly hunted by forces she doesn’t fully understand.  Years later, she forms a deep connection with a broken but kindred soul, Ashton. Together, they become scientists and uncover a dangerous truth buried beneath the lake one that links Lumy’s existence to a phenomenon capable of reshaping reality. As the past resurfaces and the hunters return, Lumy must confront what her father died to protect. Born In Blue is a story of grief, survival, inheritance, and the cost of love.

title: BORN SEXY YESTERDAY: Decoding the Enigma of Beauty
original_title: BORN SEXY YESTERDAY: Decoding the Enigma of Beauty
overview: The phrase "Born Sexy Yesterday" is derived from the 1950 film "Born Yesterday." However beneath this superficial portrayal of some women lies a more complex understanding , revealing deeper narratives that resonate with many.  October 1, 1985. The chilling emptiness in Michele Avila's eyes. Her murder, a savage ballet of teenage fury, ripped through the town, festering wounds exposing the venomous underbelly of a seemingly innocent friendship. Jealousy, a serpent coiled in the heart of adolescence, struck with the force of a viper, revealing the terrifying depths of envy's reach. These weren't just girls; they were predators.  Women are born with many layers, a mix between good and evil. Ironically of all the positive tropes that can validate the existence of women, why is it that "Born Sexy Yesterday" is a trope that resonates with our male counterparts the most?

title: The Hollow Season
overview: In the remote mountain town of Graven Hollow, autumn is more than just a season — it’s a warning. Every thirteen years, as the harvest moon rises and the leaves turn blood-red, the town prepares for a ritual it dares not speak aloud. When a group of college friends arrives for the annual fall festival, they’re drawn into a chilling legend about the Hollow Man — a masked figure born of fire and betrayal, who returns to collect a blood debt. As the friends unravel the town’s secrets and fight to survive, they discover that tradition runs deep… and some roots are soaked in horror.

title: The Waiting Man

overview: Percy Thompson (a Relocator for the Time Investigation Corporation) finds more than he bargained for when searching for his target.

title: Fuck Mr Flanagan
overview: A journey into the woods causes two stoners to question their friendship and purpose in life - while they try to avoid a devious figure named Mr Flanagan.

title: Down the Road Apiece
overview: A lonely ranch hand in rural West Texas decides to risk the only life he's ever known when he falls for a hard-pressed woman stranded in the nearby town. He makes up his mind to leave with her, but things don't quite work out as planned.

title: Wraith
overview: A psychological horror in which a man named Mark wanders a dark, deserted hospital looking for his supposedly dead wife, whose spirit continues to call out to him beyond the halls…

At 8:38 PM, May wakes up in a room with no memory. With one lifeline call, she must uncover the truth, before it’s too late. But is the voice helping her… or hiding something darker? 8 minutes is all she has.

title: Holiday Horror
overview: An anthology film featuring three tales of Halloween hijinx, Thanksgiving terror, and Christmas carnage.

title: Shush, Now
overview: A seven year old girl discovers her mum is having an affair.

title: Everyone's Here
overview: Cris decides to attend a birthday pre-game thrown by some old college friends. When the night doesn't go according to plan, Cris must resort to their own devices to get back home without a mode of transportation.

title: Logan
overview: In development.

title: Apophis 2029
overview: On April 13, 2029, the asteroid Apophis will pass close enough to Earth, it will be below our satellites. It will dip below and pop back out.

title: ViQueens
overview: Fearless Viking girls Ingrid and Hedvig defy tradition to return a stowaway boy to China. Their journey spans icy fjords, Byzantine intrigue, and the fabled Silk Road, blending Viking grit with ancient Chinese wisdom, unexpected alliances, and a touch of magic.

title: Fireworks Over Yonder
overview: When a young man named Henry wakes up from a coma on New Year's Eve 1999, he discovers that the world has changed drastically while he slept. People are no longer allowed to set foot on his city's beaches, and every night unnatural lights streak through the sky towards a destination unknown.

title: Some Other Story
overview: Upon moving back to her hometown, a nostalgic Noelle reunites with her childhood flame Matthew to relive their final date before leaving their lingering feelings in the past. But will they be able to?

title: Classy Clown
overview: In the mid 2010s, two best friends ran a vlogging YouTube channel while they were in high school. In 2026, their fictional clown mascot has suddenly come to life and kidnaps them both to try and convince them to make just one more vlog.

title: Flying Bee
overview: “Abeja Voladora” follows Ramona, a woman who begins working as a reporter at a major newspaper. After being sexually assaulted by her boss, she sets out to seek revenge, committing crimes that start drawing the attention of detective Benjamín Flores. As Benjamín investigates the cases, he unexpectedly begins to fall in love with Ramona, unaware that she is the one behind the violent acts.

title: 'Tis the Season
overview: Two wealthy children hold a washed-up mall Santa hostage as their Christmas Eve spirals into chaos.

title: The Chosen One
overview: When Peter’s contract lands in the bin, his mind soon follows. A darkly absurd descent into office paranoia, ambition, and avocado toast.

title: Untitled Doctor Who Christmas Special
overview: Plot TBA.

title: A Place in Hell
overview: A top criminal defense attorney, known for representing unlikeable clients in high-profile cases, is a relentless workhorse at her firm and fully expects to be named partner. When another attorney joins the firm, her job is put to the test and makes her question just how far she’ll go to protect it.

title: Werwulf
overview: In medieval Britain, a mysterious creature lurks in the misty landscape, bringing ancient legends to life and transforming them into a terrifying reality, forcing the villagers to confront an ancient, supernatural threat.

title: Mr. Irrelevant: The John Tuggle Story
original_title: Mr. Irrelevant: The John Tuggle Story
overview: The true story of John Tuggle, who was given the title after being the last pick of the last round of the 1983 NFL draft.

title: Someone Dies Tonight
overview: A group of friends sets out on a holiday road trip to Greece. On their way south, they are intercepted by a group of Croatian gangsters. Locked in a remote house, they find themselves struggling for their lives.

title: The Christmas Rescue: A Big Movie
original_title: The Christmas Rescue: A Big Movie
overview: When Christmas is suddenly put in danger, Elmo and his friends must jump into action and race against time to save the holiday. With the North Pole's systems failing and chaos spreading across the city, the team embarks on a fast-paced rescue mission filled with wild obstacles, unexpected challenges, and nonstop holiday excitement. As the clock ticks down, they discover that only teamwork, quick thinking, and courage can stop Christmas from disappearing forever.

title: Los Vaqueros
overview: In the early 1990s in West Texas, three ambitious young men begin their ascent to notoriety within their small town crime organization as they navigate the treacherous underworld of drugs, gambling, and illicit deals. Their rise to power brings both wealth and danger, testing their bonds and morality in a world where trust is fragile and betrayal is commonplace.

title: Winnie the Pooh: Blood and Honey 3
original_title: Winnie the Pooh: Blood and Honey 3
overview: Plot TBA. The third installment in the Blood and Honey series. New characters will be introduced, including Rabbit, the Heffalumps and the Woozles.

title: Best Of Joy: Chapter 2 - History
overview: Michael Jackson, now a world-saving hero and musical icon, finds himself adrift after the chaos of the Spotlight Seven. Haunted by fame and fractured family ties, Michael embarks on a personal journey to reunite the Jackson Five—his brothers, his roots, and the harmony he lost. But the path to healing is far from simple. As old tensions resurface and new wounds emerge, Michael must navigate the complex legacy of his past while staying true to the joy that first ignited his voice.  Set against the backdrop of forgotten towns and abandoned recording studios, Michael reconnects with each of his brothers in a heartfelt odyssey across America. With Brad and Samantha by his side, and Goku occasionally crashing in with unsolicited wisdom, Michael learns that sometimes saving the world starts with saving your family.  Stripped of supervillains and secret councils, Michael discovers that history isn’t just what you’ve lived through—it’s what you choose to remember, reclaim, and rewrite in song.

title: The Angry Birds Movie 3
overview: The third installment in The Angry Birds Movie franchise. Plot TBA

title: Classified
overview: "I can’t put words to you, I can’t put labels to you; but what I can put are a whole ton of emotions and feelings to you, and even then I can’t put words to those."

title: Sigma Males
overview: Two self-proclaimed "sigma males" go on the run for one wild night after doing an unspeakable act they can never come back from.

title: Without a Trace
overview: A criminal on the run attempts to break into a house for hiding. He realizes his escape will be far more difficult than originally planned.

title: The Tallyman
overview: Up and coming vigilante, the Tallyman, faces his biggest threat yet when he comes across a larger than life figure.

title: Order of the Dragon
overview: In a world teetering on chaos, elite assassin John Rico is the go-to solution when the government wants threats removed-quietly and permanently. But when a mission goes sideways, he's given one last shot at redemption: track down and eliminate Mason Ryker, the final ghost of the feared underground unit known as The Order of the Dragon. As Rico's mission leads him to a small, danger-ridden town in Serbia, the lines between good and evil begin to blur. Is Ryker the monster he's made out to be, or is there a deeper conspiracy at play? What begins as a black-and-white hit spirals into a moral storm-and time is running out.

title: Prodigal Son
overview: Aaron "Amadeus" Overlake is a visionary filmmaker revered for his genius but plagued by his own demons—a volatile alcoholic whose life is consumed by anger, controversy, and from a bitter heartbreak. As tabloids revel in his self-destruction, Aaron’s only anchor is his best friend, Santiago "Baron" Gonzalez, a charismatic actor fresh out of rehab, fighting to rebuild his career.  Bound by shared struggles and a tangled history, Aaron and Santiago navigate the toxic undercurrents of fame and friendship. As Aaron embarks on his next masterpiece, his chaotic life threatens to destroy everything he holds dear.

title: The Queen of Heaven
overview: The life of the Virgin Mary from the Crucifixion (33AD) till her miraculous departure/death (44AD). It also describes the early years of the Christian Church community.

title: Dune: Part Three
overview: As Emperor, Paul Atreides grapples with the consequences of his rise to power as political conspiracies and a galaxy-spanning holy war threaten the future he alone can foresee.

title: Avengers: Doomsday
overview: Beloved heroes from three distinct universes are set on a deadly collision course and face an existential threat unlike anything they've ever encountered.

title: A Man at the End of the World
original_title: A Man at the End of the World
overview: In a dystopian version of 2009, cargo delivery specialist Cole Dawson is forced into a covert operation, where he uncovers a horrifying secret with the potential to send what’s left of mankind into extinction.

title: A Penny Weighs More Than a Soul
original_title: A Penny Weighs More Than a Soul
overview: "A Penny Weighs More Than a Soul" is a powerful documentary by Tobias Demetz (TD Films) that takes viewers deep into the untouched nature of the Dolomites. The story centers on the extraordinary life of Ulrich Senoner, who lives far from modern civilization at the secluded Malga Futura. Without electricity or running water, he embodies a nearly forgotten human resilience. This film is a visual tribute to the silent strength of a man who chooses the wilderness over comfort, showcasing the fragile balance between Alpine tradition and a rapidly changing world.

title: Marrow
overview: Madison's hopeless lesbian crush on her straight and taken roommate takes a dark turn when she learns of an arcane recipe for a love potion - one that calls for her own bones.

title: Samo Lives
overview: A vibrant portrait of Jean-Michel Basquiat, the NYC artist who revolutionized 1980s art. From street graffiti to gallery stardom, his bold Neo-expressionist works left an indelible mark on the art world and beyond.

title: Duped (The Jezbel Experience)
overview: Alexandria Wright meets Elijah Martinez and the demonic journey begins. Elijah Martinez finds himself ensnared in a romantic involvement with Alexandria Wright, an unfaithful Covert Narcissist. She convinces him they are soulmates and they take a vow before God for His blessing with the penalty of betrayal being death. After years pass, Alexandria forgets the vows and begins cheating behind Elijah's back. Just a week before Christmas, she abruptly betrays him. To his astonishment, she swiftly transitions to a new relationship, bringing with her the unsettling secret of transmitting an incurable sexually transmitted disease to her new partner. Then came Karma. Her victims arrive to spit on her dirty grave as her demise finally arrives.

title: Cunk on Conspiracy
overview: Philomena Cunk investigates conspiracy theories with total confidence and zero understanding, interviewing real experts and turning serious topics into absurd, deadpan comedy.

title: Watkins Law
overview: A decade after Jallow's  sexual relationship with his teacher, Miss Watkins, they meet again and are forced to confront the past they never quite escaped.

title: The Magnificent Raiders of Dimension War One
original_title: The Magnificent Raiders of Dimension War One
overview: A collection of rogues must gather information on a mysterious extra-dimensional threat to the galaxy in the 43rd century, and prepare a defense while fending off the first wave of attacks from horrific beings.

title: Tafers Code
overview: Tafers Code follows five teenagers at the T.A.F. language school in Itaquaquecetuba, guided by the charismatic Teacher Gilmar. Each episode explores the unique challenges and strengths of the students as they discover how learning English can transform their lives. With humor, emotion, and a touch of documentary style, the series culminates in a final project that inspires not only the characters but everyone to take the first step toward a brighter future through language learning.

title: Ghollak
overview: A man falls into begging unintentionally and enjoys it.

title: Violent Night 2
overview: The sequel to the 2022 film. Plot TBA.

title: Prize
overview: A young rower is pushed beyond his limits by an ambitious new coxswain.

title: Motorgasm: a bad movie for bad people
original_title: Motorgasm: a bad movie for bad people
overview: Roxy Rancid is the coolest disk jockey in town, still she just can't seem to catch a break! 'Cause running your mouth on live radio has consequences, and she's about to learn that the hard way when she runs into a psychopathic biker with an insatiable lust blood...

title: Behind Closed Doors
overview: Marie, a young doctor, experienced a miscarriage four months ago. Unable to grieve, the marriage to her French husband Jude starts to break apart. But when her parents pay them an unexpected visit, the world which Marie has built for herself so carefully starts to crumble.

title: Kyle and Eric's Quest for the Golden Bong
original_title: Kyle and Eric's Quest for the Golden Bong
overview: Two stoners go on an epic journey, filled with trials and challanges after finding a scroll that tells of a legendary lost artifact

title: Nosebleed
overview: A psycho-sexual queer thriller which blends fantasy and reality against a backdrop of the deep, dark web; told through the eyes of a prospective serial killer.

title: Plastic Guns
overview: A standoff reveals unsettling truths for an old cowboy.

title: Hershey
overview: The story behind one of the most famous chocolate companies in the world.

title: Narnia
overview: The new upcoming film by Greta Gerwig.

title: Hexed
overview: An impulsive and unconventional teenage girl named Billie discovers secret magical abilities which, once unleashed, hurtle her into a spectacle-filled journey out of suburbia and into a vast witch realm called Hexe. Forced to team up with her cautious mother, Alice, they uncover family mysteries that could change the world of witches forever.

title: Focker-In-Law
overview: Henry, son of Greg and Pam Focker, faces family chaos when he decides to marry a strong-willed woman who appears to be his complete mismatch.

title: The Tragedy of the Bernalillo County Detectives
original_title: The Tragedy of the Bernalillo County Detectives
overview: 1979. An intense conspiracy unfolds after the robbery of a legendary fortune.

title: Jimmy
overview: A look into the life of American actor James Stewart, whose inspiring tale of valor, purpose and faith will win over everyone.

title: MEN TOO
overview: A man struggles to stay strong after a painful divorce, moving through his days with a quiet loneliness that no one notices. This PSA explores how a single moment of genuine care can change everything for someone who feels forgotten.

title: Way of the Warrior Kid
overview: Jake is an injured Navy SEAL who becomes a mentor for his shy, struggling nephew Marc. Using the principles of his military training, Jake teaches Marc how to be a Warrior Kid as he enters high school.

title: The Hunger Games: Sunrise on the Reaping
original_title: The Hunger Games: Sunrise on the Reaping
overview: Return to the world of Panem 24 years before the events of The Hunger Games, starting on the morning of the reaping of the 50th Hunger Games, also known as the Second Quarter Quell.

title: The Summer I Turned Pretty: The Movie
original_title: The Summer I Turned Pretty: The Movie
overview: A continuation of the events following the end of the TV series 'The Summer I Turned Pretty."

title: Super Champions
overview: Seven people think about their place in the universe.

title: The Death of Marion Wayne
overview: Marion Wayne is a chaotic gunslinger traveling the country with his small gang. When he gets captured by the law he learns of an indifference of power within the law, and upon breaking out of prison he pursues a revenge arc to balance the system.

title: Plucked
overview: In Gilded Age New York, a rebellious woman plans to divorce her emotionally unstable husband. Consequently, a polite and civilized evening violently spirals into pandemonium. Some things never change-until they do.

title: I Play Rocky
overview: A struggling actor with a partially paralyzed face and a speech impediment writes a script that a big movie studio wants to buy, but he refuses to sell it unless he gets to play the lead.  Turning down an offer of life-changing money, he instead works for pennies to get the movie made with himself in the starring role.  The movie becomes the biggest box office hit of 1976, notching ten Oscar nominations and winning Best Picture.  The true story of the making of the iconic movie Rocky.

title: Return of the Living Dead
overview: Eighteen months after the events at the UNEEDA Warehouse in Louisville, KY, a new Trioxin 2-4-5 leak puts a small Pennsylvania town on the brink of a zombie outbreak during Christmas 1985.

title: Santa's Workshop
overview: Nine-year-old Mari is really looking forward to Christmas. Her journalist dad, Svein, on the other hand, loves his job so much, he barely notices the festive season. One night, Mari’s Christmas list vanishes – and in its place lies a mysterious mitten. The mitten sends Mari, Svein and her adventurous grandma on an exciting quest to find Santa Claus. Meanwhile, Stubby the Wishlist Elf is in a panic — he’s lost his mitten, which might just lead this curious family straight to the secret location of Santa’s workshop! He must stop them before it’s too late!

title: Harvested 4
overview: A small town legend returns from the dead to serve vengeance on Thanksgiving night.

title: The Great Beyond
overview: A young newlywed couple struggles to survive against a supernatural entity.

title: Malvina
overview: Malvina is an angel sent to earth for being ignorant of it's problems. she falls to earth and after an incounter with a grieving mother seeks adamentley the love she talks about. when receiving this love finally she becomes addicted. she is filled with so much love for everyone she eventually loses herself completely in the desires and wants of everyone around her.

title: Wanderer
overview: WANDERER is a religious action thriller set in an alternate, dystopian future where the United States has been disbanded and divided into eight individual factions. A lone wanderer journeys across these factions, carrying a forbidden item: a Holy Bible. Hunted relentlessly by faction leaders and their military forces, the Wanderer uses the Word of God to spread hope among the oppressed citizens and fight back against the evil forces controlling them.

title: On Your Feet!
overview: A film adaptation of the Broadway musical based on the lives of Gloria and Emilio Estefan.

title: The Cat in the Hat
overview: Doing what he does best, the Cat spreads joy to kids in his hilarious, signature, and singularly irreverent way, transporting them and audiences on a fantastical journey through a world they've never seen before. Our hero takes on his toughest assignment yet for the I.I.I.I. (Institute for the Institution of Imagination and Inspiration, LLC) to cheer up Gabby and Sebastian, a pair of siblings struggling to move to a new town. Known for taking things too far, this could be this agent of chaos' last chance to prove himself...or lose his magical hat!

title: Wild Horse Nine
overview: Shortly before the 1973 Chilean coup, CIA agents Chris and Lee are dispatched from Santiago to Easter Island by their bureau chief, MJ. Amongst the Island's iconic statues, and as the longtime partners wrestle with their dark pasts and present conspiracies, Chris's newfound bond with a pair of rebellious students threatens to send everyone’s trip to this remote paradise sideways.

title: Archangel
overview: A weapons researcher protects his community from an aggressive corporation.

title: Thera: The Inverted Planet
overview: On another world much like our own, a young Samoyed named Seamus Alessandro O'Shaughnessy discovers a lost girl named Dakota who has unfathomable magic! Seamus must overcome great challenges both physical & emotional alongside his best friend Carolina Oriqueda Campbell Keeshond-Seal to save Great Canyon City from the Menace known as The Blurred Blaze! Can our heroes defeat their foes while simultaneously protecting an innocent child in the process? And who exactly is The Blurred Blaze?

title: Almost Cupid
overview: To get his wings, a newly hired cupid must choose between doing the job and honouring free will after being assigned to save a toxic relationship that shouldn't exist.

title: Summer's End
overview: Grace has spent the summer looking after her dad, who is still mourning over the loss of his wife who died when Grace was a child. When her unpredictable older brother Oscar brings his friends to stay with them, Grace is forced to confront her relationship with the past and her expectations of the future.

title: Don't Let The Bastards Grind You Down
original_title: Don't Let The Bastards Grind You Down
overview: "Don't Let The Bastards Grind You Down" is a documentary film about British social policy. The focus is on the political struggle against neoliberal austerity policies, which have their origins in the hated Thatcher government.  The film features the former socialist MP Dave Nellist, who is now the national chair of the Trade Unionist & Socialist Coalition and Hannah Sell, the general secretary of the Socialist Party. The film features a local election campaign in the miners' town of Nuneaton, students campaigning against an increase in tuition fees and refuse workers from Birmingham striking against massive cuts to their wages.

title: FaceTape
overview: A junkie decides to come clean from abusing an analog VR drug called FaceTape only to find his life outside of his addiction is far from stable.

title: Demonology
overview: A small team of paranormal investigators are hired to investigate a remote property where a grieving couple claims to have encountered a demonic force. As they unravel the mystery, they begin to realize they are not welcome.

title: Power-Man
overview: Power-Man, the masked vigilante of Vancouver, meets a new enemy when he seizes control of television and uses it to brainwash the people of the city to become his minions.

title: + Add Friend
overview: A working man must confront his secret shame as his online activity unravels into his personal life- following an intimate encounter with an anonymous internet user.

title: Scream: Short Film
overview: After a brutal murder reawakens Woodsboro's dark past, Cora Clemenzo is pulled into a new Ghostface killing spree as her friends in the Woodsboro High Cinema Club become suspects and survival means uncovering the truth before history repeats itself...

title: Knock, Knock, Knock
overview: Three years after the Jamestown NightStalker murders in 2024 that killed both his brothers, Collin Woods lives in a state of confusion and paranoia. Seeing a psychiatrist and living with his best friend, his symptoms worsen when a reoccurring dream predicts the return of The NightStalker. As people around Collin begin to be killed, he is forced to confront his fate, or watch as The NightStalker takes the couple things he still has left.

title: Bullet and Lace
overview: Bullet and Lace, a neon-soaked, Giallo-inspired nightmare, follows a young woman whose favorite true crime podcast becomes the voice of the masked intruder stalking her through the night.

title: Black Hollow
overview: Set in the rural Midwest during the 1970s, Black Hollow follows Jessica, an innocent young girl sheltered by small-town faith and her worldly friend Helen, whose rebellious streak leads them both into danger. When the two sneak out one foggy night, they wander to a forgotten churchyard, an isolated place where sacred ground conceals something unholy. As darkness descends, Jessica's search for belonging turns to horror, forcing her to confront the evil that thrives beneath the surface of the American heartland.

title: Watergate
overview: A sequel to Rupert v Nixon and the end for the RNCU

title: Forget-me-not
overview: Dean Carter's mind unravels while deciphering the mystery behind the disappearance of his fiancé.

title: Proposal
overview: When a brother tries to stop his sister from proposing to her girlfriend, the siblings peel back the layers of their relationship in real time.

title: The Salesman
overview: After the death of his wife, a man is greeted by an enthusiastic salesman.

title: Dead Howling
overview: A werewolf hunts zombies after losing his family. He meets two humans seeking sanctuary and joins their quest, protecting them with his powers. Their journey grows perilous as zombies start evolving.

title: Wendehorn
overview: Tara enters forbidden territory trying to find the wendehorn

title: REEL
overview: After a late-night slasher screening, a group of horror-loving friends find themselves trapped in a terrifying game where slasher movie rules become reality. As eerie events unfold, they realize someone is rewriting the genre—forcing them to fight for survival in a film that’s still being written. The only way out? Break the rules before it’s too late.

title: Ballad Of The Trumpet
overview: An unexperienced robber brings his obnoxious best friend along for his last job. But, as the night grows colder they soon realize they are in for a lot more than they bargained for. Can they handle the truth?

title: How They Really Are
overview: A boy named Tyler Ortin is struggling with lonlieness and the problem of his parents constant fighting when he becomes friends with a classmate Louey. Tyler helps his class get their grades back on track but the stress catches up to him.

title: Nocturne in White
overview: An office worker drifts through a nameless government building that runs experiments on humans. As repetition begins to distort her reality, she becomes overwhelmed by the guilt and the sneaking suspicion that she may also be a subject of experimentation.

title: Ghosts: The Possession of Button House
original_title: Ghosts: The Possession of Button House
overview: It's a matter of life and death for Alison, Mike, Mia and the Ghosts.

title: Convince Me
overview: When a heartbroken man is forced to convince the Devil to grant his wish, he must face the truth about himself or risk paying an eternal price.

title: Faust
overview: After making a deal with the devil, an isolated and unsatisfied professor uses supernatural means to achieve success and happiness at the cost of his soul.

title: Wife & Dog
overview: A "return to the colourful, back-stabbing world of the British aristocracy", this pic follows the relentless greed of the Fairbank family and their associates who fuel betrayal and murder in the battle for succession.

title: Klara and the Sun
overview: Klara, an Artificial Friend designed to prevent loneliness, is purchased by a mother and her bright teen daughter, Josie. Josie, who suffers from a mysterious illness, adores her new robot companion. On a quest to save Josie and those who love her from heartbreak, Klara learns the power of human love.

title: SYNTHETICA
overview: Ada, a retired hacker living quietly as an art curator, discovers an illegal neural implant in their head after experiencing dangerous memory glitches. When an underground surgeon can't safely remove it, Ada is forced to accept one last job: infiltrate the corporation that created the device. As the mission unfolds, Ada must confront the truth about their forgotten past and the real purpose of the technology buried in their mind.

title: Flamin­go Flamenco
overview: The Fuente de Piedra lagoon in Spain is home to one of the largest flocks of flamingos in Europe. Once a year, the adolescent birds perform a dance that looks like... flamenco! But when the flock is attacked by hateful podencos (wild dogs) our heroine Rosie, a fun, dance crazy flamingo, loses her beloved sister and the flamenco is cancelled henceforth. She grows up a shadow of her former self, robbed of her sisters love and the joy of dance. One day she meets Carlos, an exuberant lizard, who encourages her to dance once more - rekindling her inner flame. Over time, she transforms back into her old confident self, before leading her flock to face down the podencos and dance once more.

title: Wildwood
overview: A girl’s desperate quest to save her baby brother unfolds into a spectacular, high-stakes adventure through a forbidden forest full of enchanted creatures, endearing allies, and formidable adversaries—where an entire hidden realm hangs in the balance.

title: Clayface
overview: Follow the terrifying descent into hell of a promising Hollywood actor who has become a monster driven by revenge, exploring the loss of identity and humanity, the ravages of toxic love and the dark side of scientific ambition.

title: Superfly
overview: Coming Soon

title: The Observer
overview: A UFO mystery/thriller inspired by The Twilight Zone. Plot TBA.

title: Slash
overview: A group of friends are terrorized by a masked killer on Halloween.

title: November 1963
overview: Unfolds within the intense 48-hour period surrounding the assassination of President John F. Kennedy. The film sheds light on crime group the Chicago Outfit’s alleged involvement in the assassination and draws directly from first-hand accounts, including insights from the family of crime boss Sam Giancana.

title: Call Me Queen
overview: The film depicts a friendship between an Irish journalist in Kenya and a Rwandan woman, who pair up to combat the AIDS crisis in the 1990s.

title: Maleepnedos
overview: An epic journey of uncanny proportion in which two friends must adapt and survive the peculiarities of this strange new world.

title: Street Fighter
overview: In 1993, estranged Street Fighters Ryu and Ken Masters are thrown back into combat when the mysterious Chun-Li recruits them for the next World Warrior Tournament: a brutal clash of fists, fate, and fury. But behind this battle royale lies a deadly conspiracy that forces them to face off against each other and the demons of their past. And if they don't, it's GAME OVER!

title: Dolioo
overview: Sarah Jamson, daughter of Hudson’s murdered ally, wages a one-woman war against Hudson, using stealth, strategy, and vengeance-marked corpses to haunt him psychologically. Chloe Varenne, a symbol of lost love and innocence, becomes the spark that pushes KAEL toward rebellion.

title: Currents
overview: 4 strangers follow completely different paths through the same day. Leading them all to meeting at a beach party filled with chaos, drama, and action.

title: Mike
overview: A young man spirals through buried trauma and impulsive choices, igniting a thrilling descent into loss, desperation, and survival.

title: My Body is a Prison
overview: Conner brings his pillow to life

title: Analog Eyes
overview: A loner dork gets fed up with the monotony of his existence under the shadow of his narcissistic friend. Forcing the the pair to reevaluate their place in life.

title: Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender
overview: Avatar Aang, the world's last Airbender, learns of an ancient power that could save his culture from extinction. With the help of his friends, he embarks on a global quest to find it before it falls into the wrong hands and threatens to upend the peace they sacrificed everything to achieve.

title: Other Mommy
overview: A young girl as her family, and their home, are haunted by a sinister entity that is determined to take up residence inside her. But first, it needs to persuade her to let it in…

title: Matchbox
overview: When a group of former childhood friends reconnect, their reunion takes a wild turn as they stumble upon a dangerous international plot—and must save the world.

title: The Social Reckoning
overview: Frances Haugen, a young Facebook engineer, enlists the help of Jeff Horwitz, a Wall Street Journal reporter, to go on a dangerous journey that ends up blowing the whistle on the social network's most guarded secrets.

title: NYRA II
overview: Trapped in a series of looping dream timelines, Nyra is hunted by an unknown killer and must find a way to escape before the cycles consume her.

title: When Anyone Sees
overview: Christian, a young man overlooked by society, burdened by a dark past and escalating madness, finds himself trapped in a world of violence and despair.

title: The Fall of Barsisa
overview: A modern re-imagining of the fable of the same name. Three brothers leave their ailing sister in the company of a devout and honourable figure as they are guided by an ambiguous stranger through treacherous terrain in search of a remedy.

title: Deadsight
overview: A cold-blooded contract killer known only as Deadsight executes without hesitation in order to clear his criminal record.

title: Secrets of the Southwest
overview: Discover the hidden stories Britain's southwest has to offer. From Foxes fighting on the streets of Bristol to Puffins looking for love on Skomer Island.

title: Secrets of the Southwest: Science Behind the Secrets
original_title: Secrets of the Southwest: Science Behind the Secrets
overview: Meet the inspiring individuals and communities who work to protect our most beloved UK wildlife.

title: Believers
overview: A ragtag amateur cricket team from the UK tours The Gambia to face a national side far beyond their level. As losses mount and bonds deepen, they discover what the game truly means to them.

title: Rostam
overview: A night in ancient Persia, full of demons, vampires, jinn, and heroes, after the world has been plunged into darkness. The creatures of the night feed on the living and bask in the victory, but something is coming for them, and he will not stop.

title: If You Can Make It Here
original_title: If You Can Make It Here
overview: Kingsley, Kevin, and Hailey are three ambitious eighth graders preparing for a single exam that could determine their futures. They’re competing for admission to New York City’s Specialized High Schools, elite public institutions that have produced Nobel Prize laureates, astronauts, judges, artists, and national leaders. But as the kids await their test results, a citywide battle is raging over who should attend these schools—the kids who score highest on the entrance exam or the kids who improve diversity. Featuring interviews with kids, parents, and education leaders, If You Can Make It Here places young students at the center of a high-stakes cultural conflict over the future of equity and excellence in public education.

title: Robbin' the Hood
overview: Two brothers are roped into a scheme to rob from the rich and give to the poor, only to find their victims are not who they think they are.

title: Artificial
overview: An undercover cop is assigned to monitor a humanoid robot, but an unexpected bond over art leads to a final task: creating a painting.

title: Nightmares
overview: The true story that became the basis one of the greatest horror movies of all time, following a journalist attempting to uncover the truth behind several unexplained deaths

title: The Ascent
overview: Wedding guests at a European resort face terror when their celebration turns into a life-or-death struggle high above dangerous waters teeming with sharks.

title: Verity
overview: Struggling writer Lowen Ashleigh is on the brink of financial ruin when she accepts the job offer of a lifetime: she's been hired to complete the remaining books in a successful series that bestselling thriller author Verity Crawford is unable to finish after a mysterious accident. Upon arrival at the lavish Crawford estate, Lowen slowly learns that things are not exactly as they seem.

title: Digger
overview: The most powerful man in the world embarks on a frantic mission to prove he is humanity's saviour before the disaster he’s unleashed destroys everything.

title: Uprooted
overview: Just as a couple prepares to welcome their long-awaited child, a devoted couple meets a troubled teen whose wounded heart resists faith. Their paths intertwine in a story of love, healing, and unexpected grace.

title: No More Time
overview: A sequel to the short film “Too Much Time”. Plot TBA.

title: American Flake
overview: A small-town drug dealer avoids grieving the death of his mom by searching for a lost bag of his favorite potato chips.

title: Sunlight Resonance
overview: A washed-up Hollywood actor wakes up amnesiac, fights through depression, addiction, and guilt.

title: After Everyone's Gone
overview: After returning home for Christmas, a young woman finds herself alone in a space that no longer feels like hers. As memory, routine, and something unexpected begin to blur together, she's forced to confront what it means to stay or to leave.
